title: Camden Has Significant Rent Growth Ahead
text: We see a great setup for further rent growth in sunbelt apartments. Full occupancy, undersupply and the unaffordability of single-family homes all pave the way for rising apartment rents.

title: 7 REITs to Buy for the Second Half of 2022
text: Consider these seven high-quality real estate investment trusts some of the best REITs to buy and hold for the rest of the year. The post 7 REITs to Buy for the Second Half of 2022 appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Camden (CPT) Loses 13.1% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
text: Camden (CPT) has become technically an oversold stock now, which implies exhaustion of the heavy selling pressure on it. This, combined with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher, indicates a potential trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
